name: deeporbit
description: Local-first Obsidian research, knowledge, task, and retrieval workflows for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Turn an Obsidian vault into a portable knowledge system.
interface.longDescription: DeepOrbit provides checkpointed research, local retrieval, writing, task, agenda, calendar, and vault-maintenance workflows.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use DeepOrbit to work with this Obsidian vault.
